name: Parmesan Twists
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:25
1. Cream butter until smooth.
2. Add cheese and sour cream, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Combine flour and Italian seasoning in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the creamed mixture, blending until smooth.
5. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Divide into two halves.
6. Roll out one half of the dough to a 12- x 7-inch rectangle.
7. Cut into 6 strips that are 6 inches long and about half an inch wide.
8. Twist each strip 2 or 3 times, then place on greased baking sheets.
9. Repeat steps 5-8 with the remaining dough.
10. Beat egg yolk until smooth, then whisk in water.
11. Brush the strips with the egg mixture.
12. Sprinkle seeds over the twisted strips.
13. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes or until browned. Yield: 4-1/2 dozen.
